text_original: I've been using this app for about a month now as a paid user and I'm hitting the same issue. The game encourages multiple story streams at once to collect points for exchanging for pictures etc, but all the storylines quickly descend into the same insecure damsel in distress, constantly seeking validation. I'm not into that at all and the memory module isn't great either, forgetting things or re-asking the same questions over and over. I don't think it's really ready for the market yet, tbh.
text_zh: 作为一个付费用户，我已经使用这个应用大约一个月了，但我遇到了同样的问题。游戏鼓励同时进行多条故事线，以收集积分兑换图片等，但所有的故事情节很快都会沦为同一种套路：缺乏安全感、不断寻求认可的落难少女。我一点也不喜欢这种设定，而且记忆模块也不太好用，经常遗忘事情或者反复问同样的问题。老实说，我认为它还没有真正准备好推向市场。
reply_original: Thank you for the honest feedback. The repetitive personality patterns and memory gaps are real issues we're actively working on. Your specific observations about story divergence and re-asking questions are exactly what our team needs to hear. We've logged this. If you're open to it, email us at support@fantachat.
reply_zh:
你好，对于这次不愉快的体验，我深表歉意。我理解当角色失去独特个性或遗忘关键细节时是多么令人沮丧。

我们最近升级了记忆服务，以提升长期记忆能力。
reply_original_before_override:
Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience. I understand how frustrating it is when characters lose their unique personalities or forget key details.

We recently upgraded our Memory Service to improve long-term retention.
override_input: Thank you for the honest feedback. The repetitive personality patterns and memory gaps are real issues we're actively working on. Your specific observations about story divergence and re-asking questions are exactly what our team needs to hear. We've logged this. If you're open to it, email us at support@fantachat.ai so we can follow up directly.
